docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY AMIN, HAITHAM AS TO DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE (AIR FRANCE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMIN, HAITHAM AS TO DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE (AIR FRANCE)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-07-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE (AIR FRANCE)
SC-109 AUTHOIZATION TO APPEAR MANA GRIFFITH FILED BY DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE (AIR FRANCE)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM MANA GRIFFITH FILED BY DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE (AIR FRANCE)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM MANA GRIFFITH FILED BY DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE (AIR FRANCE)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM
DECLARATION RE: REQUES TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMIN, HAITHAM
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. MANA GRIFFITH
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DIENIED*** BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF TO FILE CASE IN THE PROPER COURT TO AWARD HIM EMOTIONAL DISTRESS AND THE LIKE. VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF HAITHAM AMIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE (AIR FRANCE) IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
